description: A responsive grid of linked content cards (2x2 or 3-column). Each card displays an image, eyebrow label, title, and CTA. Used on hub pages to link to sub-sections or related content.

FR-01.title: Grid Layout
FR-01.description: The block MUST render cards in a responsive grid layout.
acceptance: Desktop: 2x2, 3-column, or 4-column grid depending on content

FR-02.title: Card Image
FR-02.description: Each card MUST display an image.
acceptance: Consistent aspect ratio across cards in the grid

FR-03.title: Card Eyebrow
FR-03.description: Each card SHOULD display an eyebrow category label.

FR-04.title: Card Title
FR-04.description: Each card MUST display a title.

FR-05.title: Card Link
FR-05.description: Each card MUST be a fully clickable link.
acceptance: Entire card area is a single anchor element
Links to detail page or sub-section
Hover state applied to entire card

FR-06.title: Optional Metadata
FR-06.description: Cards MAY display additional metadata such as date or reading time.

A.description: Rich card with image, date, eyebrow, title, description, and CTA. Used for story/article cards on hub pages.

additionalRequirements.FR-A01: Card includes a short description paragraph.
additionalRequirements.FR-A02: CTA text displayed at bottom: 'Read story' or 'Learn more' with arrow.

B.description: Simpler card with image and title only, used for navigating to sub-sections. Less content than Variant A.
usedOn: Patients Hub (Patient Support Programs, Educational Programs, Partnerships, Grants)

additionalRequirements.FR-B01: No date, reading time, or CTA text displayed.
additionalRequirements.FR-B02: Title serves as the primary content.

accessibility.AC-01: Card links MUST have descriptive accessible names
accessibility.AC-02: Images MUST have meaningful alt text
accessibility.AC-03: Grid MUST maintain logical reading order when stacked
accessibility.AC-04: Card hover/focus state MUST be clearly visible
